ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the gene belongs to */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the gene the transcript belongs to */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the transcript */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the transcript */,
  "transcript_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transcript */,
  "transcript_type" TEXT /* Type of the transcript */,
  "isoform" INTEGER /* Is the transcript part of an isoform group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transcript information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transcript information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Reference to the transcript the exon belongs to */,
  "exon_name" TEXT /* Name of the exon */,
  "exon_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the exon within the transcript */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the exon on the transcript */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the exon on the transcript */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the exon */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the exon */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Protein sequence encoded by the exon */,
  "incomplete_cds" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the coding sequence is incomplete */,
  "exon_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exon */,
  "exon_function" TEXT /* Function or role of the exon in the transcript */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exon information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exon information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Reference to the transcript the annotation belongs to */,
  "exon_id" TEXT /* Reference to the exon the annotation belongs to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "experiment_source" TEXT /* Experiment source for the annotation */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags associated with the annotation */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the protein encoded by the transcript */,
  "annotation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation */,
  "validated_by" TEXT /* User who validated the annotation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was validated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_exon_id FOREIGN KEY ("exon_id") REFERENCES exons ("exon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, annotation specialist, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* ID of the transcript being accessed */,
  "exon_id" TEXT /* ID of the exon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session during which the access occurred */,
  "accessed_through" TEXT /* Method through which the data was accessed (e.g., web interface, API, command line tool) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_exon_id FOREIGN KEY ("exon_id") REFERENCES exons ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the entity (transcript, gene, or annotation) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
